headings.rules: Never use Inter or Roboto. Use tracking-tight for sizes above 32px. Use font-bold to font-black for tension. Avoid centering.

body.rules: Highly legible, geometric body text. Left-align mostly. Loose leading (leading-relaxed) for paragraphs.

layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: p-6 or p-8 inside cards. No cramped layouts.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-lg (8px) maximum. Maintain sharp, authoritative edge.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align data. Avoid symmetry. Optical alignment.

components.cards_and_surfaces: Use pure white backgrounds (#FFFFFF) on tinted app background (#F8F9FA). 1px solid border (border-black/5). No soft shadows (shadow-none) to maintain Swiss flat aesthetic. On hover, slightly translate up (-translate-y-0.5) and add shadow-sm.
components.buttons: Flat, sharp borders. Primary CTA is brand_action (#002FA7) with pure white text. Hover state must explicitly set text-white. Secondary buttons are bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.drag_drop_upload: Use 'Grid Borders' or dashed container. bg-slate-50 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-lg p-12 text-center hover:border-blue-600 transition-colors. Center iconic upload graphic.
components.navigation_header: Solid white header, 1px bottom border border-slate-200. No transparency. Include Logo, Nav links, and Primary 'Upload Resumes' CTA.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Left aligned. Dense spacing (py-3 px-4). Alternate row colors slightly or keep pure white with border-b. Ensure status badges pop against neutral table.
components.progress_bars: For category scores, use crisp 4px height progress bars. No rounded ends (rounded-none) to fit the Swiss theme.
components.tabs: Settings page uses tabs. Avoid pills. Use sharp under-line tabs (border-b-2 border-transparent hover:border-slate-300 data-[state=active]:border-[#002FA7] data-[state=active]:text-[#002FA7]).
components.modals_dialogs: Solid background, sharp drop-shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]. Do not use glassmorphism.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React but configure with sharp attributes: strokeWidth={1.5}. Maintain consistency in sizing (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for empty states).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets 4.5:1. Primary action #002FA7 against white is compliant.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every button, tab, input, table-row, and key info block must have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-resume-button', data-testid='candidate-row-0').

images.description: Abstract geometric minimalist logo for SignalRank header.
Empty state office plant desk minimalist.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject Fontshare import links for Cabinet Grotesk and Satoshi into the HTML head.
Tailwind configuration must extend colors to include the functional and brand variables.
Implement the 'Control Room' dense grid for the candidates dashboard.
For the 8-category score breakdown, use horizontal progress bars with crisp edges (rounded-none) inside the table or details page.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' overuse. Use raw div with bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-lg.
Ensure the Drag-and-Drop file uploader covers a large hit area and visually shifts on drag over.
Every actionable or dynamically rendered element MUST HAVE data-testid attributes.
Use the exact media URLs provided for avatars, logo, and empty state.
